svg.title: Variational Autoencoder (VAE)
svg.desc: Flow diagram of a Variational Autoencoder: input x passes through Encoder q_φ(z|x) to produce μ and σ, then the reparameterization trick samples z = μ + σ⊙ε where ε~N(0,1), then Decoder p_θ(x|z) reconstructs x̂. The loss is reconstruction minus KL divergence.

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: maximize ELBO = maximize reconstruction + minimize posterior deviation from prior
